tool.name: cloud_enumeration
tool.description: Cloud Enumeration Suite for discovering cloud storage resources across AWS, Azure, and GCP.
tool.details: Common Use Cases: - Generate S3 bucket enumeration tests - Generate Azure Blob storage enumeration tests - Generate GCP bucket enumeration tests - Generate wordlists for bucket name discovery - Test cloud storage permissions and misconfigurations

parameter.name: action
parameter.description: The enumeration action to perform: - enumerate_s3: Generate S3 bucket enumeration tests - enumerate_azure_blob: Generate Azure Blob storage tests - enumerate_gcp_bucket: Generate GCP bucket tests - generate_wordlist: Generate wordlist for bucket names

parameter.name: target
parameter.description: Target to enumerate (bucket name, domain, etc.)

parameter.name: company_name
parameter.description: Company name for generating bucket names and wordlists

parameter.name: region
parameter.description: Cloud region to target (e.g., us-east-1 for AWS)

returns.description: Enumeration results including test URLs, permission tests, and naming patterns

tool.examples:
# Enumerate S3 buckets
enumerate_s3 company-data
# Enumerate Azure Blob storage
enumerate_azure_blob companydata
# Enumerate GCP buckets
enumerate_gcp_bucket company-data
# Generate wordlist for bucket discovery
generate_wordlist Acme Corp
